task: Find technical specs for the latest Macbook Air on Apple.
final_result_response:
I now have the complete technical specifications for the latest MacBook Air from Apple's website. Let me compile and present the results.

Here are the **MacBook Air Technical Specifications** (latest model with Apple M4 chip):

---

### **Models & Pricing (13-inch)**
| | Model 1 | Model 2 | Model 3 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Price** | $999 | $1,199 | $1,399 |

### **Finish**
Sky Blue, Silver, Starlight, Midnight

### **Chip**
- **Apple M4 chip**
- 10-core CPU (4 performance + 6 efficiency cores)
- 8-core GPU (Model 1) / 10-core GPU (Models 2 & 3)
- Hardware-accelerated ray tracing
- 16-core Neural Engine
- 120GB/s memory bandwidth
- **Media Engine:** Hardware-accelerated H.264, HEVC, ProRes, ProRes RAW; AV1 decode

### **Display**
- Liquid Retina display
- 13.6-inch (diagonal) LED-backlit with IPS technology
- 2560×1664 native resolution at 224 ppi
- 500 nits brightness
- 1 billion colors, Wide color (P3), True Tone

### **Memory**
- 16GB unified memory (Models 1 & 2), 24GB (Model 3)
- Configurable up to 32GB

### **Storage**
- 256GB SSD (Model 1), 512GB SSD (Models 2 & 3)
- Configurable up to 2TB

### **Battery & Power**
- Up to 18 hours video streaming / 15 hours wireless web
- 53.8 Wh lithium-polymer battery
- Fast-charge capable with 70W USB-C adapter

### **Charging & Expansion**
- MagSafe 3 charging port
- 3.5 mm headphone jack
- Two Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C) ports (up to 40Gb/s)

### **Display Support**
- Up to two external displays at 6K @ 60Hz

### **Wireless**
- Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax)
- Bluetooth 5.3

### **Camera**
- 12MP Center Stage with Desk View support
- 1080p HD video recording

### **Audio**
- Four-speaker sound system
- Spatial Audio with Dolby Atmos
- Three-mic array with directional beamforming

### **Keyboard & Trackpad**
- Backlit Magic Keyboard with Touch ID
- Force Touch trackpad

### **Size & Weight**
- Height: 0.44 inch (1.13 cm)
- Width: 11.97 inches (30.41 cm)
- Depth: 8.46 inches (21.5 cm)
- Weight: 2.7 pounds (1.24 kg)

### **Operating System**
- macOS

### **Apple Intelligence**
- Built-in (available in beta)

---

The specs are sourced directly from [apple.com/macbook-air/specs/](https://www.apple.com/macbook-air/specs/). A 15-inch model is also available with a larger display. Would you like me to look up the 15-inch specs as well?
